task: Phase 9 v0.1.5 — Windows keychain bridge (PowerShell + Add-Type PInvoke against advapi32!CredReadW). Linux secret-tool branch UNTOUCHED. macOS branch UNTOUCHED. Plan: .omc/plans/phase-9-windows-keychain-v3.md (consensus-approved 2026-04-24).

stories.title: keychain.ts Windows branch — inline PowerShell + Add-Type PInvoke + ASCII sentinel
acceptanceCriteria: src/axhub-helpers/keychain.ts win32 branch (currently lines 91-96 deferred error) replaced: spawn powershell.exe with single Add-Type -TypeDefinition inline C# stub for CredReadW + CredFree + CREDENTIAL struct.
PS script first line: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop' (PS5.1 terminating exception hardening per architect synthesis).

ASCII sentinel scheme — success: stdout 'AXHUB_OK:<base64>'. Missing credential: stdout 'ERR:NOT_FOUND'. C# compile/load failure: stderr 'ERR:LOAD_FAIL'. Locale-independent (no English stderr parsing).
TS side decodeWindowsBlob: base64 decode → UTF-8 → reuse existing parseKeyringValue (no new decoder).

readWindowsKeychain extracted into new src/axhub-helpers/keychain-windows.ts module exporting (a) PS_SCRIPT string (using String.raw to avoid template-literal interpolation of $variables), (b) async readWindowsKeychain(runner = Bun.spawnSync) function. CommandRunner type imported from preflight.ts (do not redefine).
spawnSync timeout: 8000ms (vs macOS 5000ms — accommodates PS startup latency).
5 Windows error scenarios all 4-part Korean (감정/원인/해결/다음액션): ExecutionPolicy block, NOT_FOUND, PInvoke load failure, EDR/AMSI quarantine (signal != null OR exit ∈ {-1, 0xC0000409}), spawnSync throws.

EDR error message MUST NOT instruct user to ask IT for 'EDR allowlist 추가' (SOC will reject for unsigned binary doing PInvoke). Use 'v0.1.5 코드사이닝 전 — 우리 책임. AXHUB_TOKEN 환경변수가 정식 회피 경로. v0.1.6 Authenticode 후 EDR allowlist 가능' framing.
Empty CredentialBlob → early-return ERR:NOT_FOUND (treat same as missing credential). NO new error message for empty-blob path (per Critic round 2 Fix 1 path b).
Linux secret-tool branch (keychain.ts:65-90) UNTOUCHED.
macOS security branch (keychain.ts:46-66) UNTOUCHED.
Returns { token, source: 'windows-credential-manager' } on success.

stories.title: docs additive — Windows mentions added (7 edits / 6 files). Linux/macOS untouched.
acceptanceCriteria: skills/auth/SKILL.md:55 + :58 — add Windows parallel sentence to existing macOS+Linux headless guidance. PS-only architecture aligned: 'axhub-helpers token-init 가 PowerShell 단일 호출로 자격증명을 직접 읽어옵니다.' NO cmdkey instruction (cmdkey returns exit 0 in both present/missing cases — useless for probe).
skills/deploy/references/headless-flow.md:60 — add Windows command line `# Windows: PowerShell + Add-Type 단일 호출 (axhub-helpers 가 자동 처리)` after existing macOS/Linux block.
skills/deploy/references/recovery-flows.md:87 — same Windows PS-only addition pattern.
docs/pilot/admin-rollout.ko.md:96 — Windows context added to 'headless 환경 (Codespaces, SSH)' paragraph: 'Windows: PowerShell + Credential Manager 통합'.
src/axhub-helpers/list-deployments.ts:13-16 JSDoc — add Windows mention: 'Windows PowerShell + Advapi32 CredReadW' alongside existing token discovery comment.
bin/README.md:31 — add note: 'windows-amd64.exe: PowerShell + Add-Type PInvoke against advapi32 (no Install-Module required, stock Win10/11)'.
ALL Linux + macOS existing mentions UNTOUCHED. Additive only.
Korean text grammatically natural.
bash tests/docs-link-audit.sh → Broken: 0.

stories.title: tests/keychain-windows.test.ts — 6 mocked-runner cases + parseKeyringValue extraction
acceptanceCriteria: New file tests/keychain.test.ts — extracts the 8 existing parseKeyringValue tests from tests/token-init.test.ts:88-145 (move not duplicate).
tests/token-init.test.ts:88-145 parseKeyringValue describe block REMOVED (extracted to keychain.test.ts).

tests/token-init.test.ts:81-86 (Windows deferred-error 3 assertions) REPLACED with 3 new assertions: powershell.exe spawn + Add-Type + advapi32 + CredReadW present in keychain-windows.ts source (read via readFileSync).

New file tests/keychain-windows.test.ts — 6 mocked-runner test cases via injected runner: (1) success → AXHUB_OK:<base64> → token extracted, (2) ExecutionPolicy block → exit 1 + stderr matches 'execution of scripts' → 4-part Korean ExecutionPolicy message, (3) NOT_FOUND → stdout ERR:NOT_FOUND → 4-part Korean missing-credential message, (4) PInvoke load failure → stdout ERR:LOAD_FAIL → 4-part Korean PInvoke message, (5) EDR signal kill → result.signal != null OR exit ∈ {-1, 0xC0000409} → 4-part Korean EDR honesty message (no IT-allowlist instruction), (6) spawnSync throws → 4-part Korean spawn-failure message.
Test count after Phase 9: 343 (Phase 8 baseline) + 6 (windows mocks) = 349 pass / 354 total / 15 files.
bun test 2>&1 | tail -8 → '349 pass / 5 skip / 0 fail / 354 tests across 15 files'.
bunx tsc --noEmit → clean.

stories.title: GitHub issue — format-parity v0.1.6 deferral tracking
acceptanceCriteria: gh issue create — title: 'Format-parity: keychain.ts existing one-liner errors → 4-part empathy template (v0.1.6)'

Body: lists keychain.ts existing line numbers (54, 59, 62, 76, 82, 86, 93) that are one-line Korean errors NOT 4-part per error-empathy-catalog.md:76-148. Phase 9 v0.1.5 ships Windows 4-part from day one but defers existing macOS/Linux line repair to v0.1.6 to keep Phase 9 surgical.
Labels: 'format-parity', 'v0.1.6', 'deferred-from-phase-9'.
Issue URL captured to .omc/state/us-905-issue-url.txt for US-904 CHANGELOG handoff.
Issue is OPEN status in github.com/jocoding-ax-partners/axhub.

stories.title: v0.1.5 release ship — bump + codegen + tag + CI green + verify
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1: Read .omc/state/us-905-issue-url.txt (US-905 artifact handoff).
Step 2: Substitute {US905_ISSUE_URL} placeholder in CHANGELOG entry with actual URL from step 1.
Step 3: Verify CHANGELOG.md contains valid GitHub issue URL pattern (grep -E 'https://github.com/jocoding-ax-partners/axhub/issues/[0-9]+').
Version bump: package.json + .claude-plugin/{plugin,marketplace}.json 0.1.4 → 0.1.5.
bun run codegen:version → 3 file auto-sync (install.sh + index.ts PLUGIN_VERSION + telemetry.ts).
CHANGELOG.md new v0.1.5 entry: Added (Windows keychain bridge), Unchanged (Linux secret-tool, macOS security), Deferred (v0.1.6 link to US-905 issue).
git commit + push origin main.
git tag v0.1.5 + push origin v0.1.5 → CI release workflow auto-trigger.
CI conclusion: success (5 binaries built, 5 cosign sigs, manifest signed).
bash scripts/release/verify-release.sh v0.1.5 → 'All release assets verified for jocoding-ax-partners/axhub@v0.1.5'.

Live binary self-report (downloaded windows-amd64.exe via curl): version subcommand prints 'axhub-helpers 0.1.5 (plugin v0.1.5, schema v0)'. Skip exec-on-mac if cross-platform issues — verify only via file size + sha256 match in that case.
docs/pilot/v0.1.5-verify-result.txt — capture cosign + sha256 verify output + binary size match.
docs/pilot/launch-readiness-checklist.md — baseline updated v0.1.4 → v0.1.5.
